# DOCA Skills LLM Entrypoint

Applies to: `NVIDIA-DOCA/doca-skills`
Read when: an agent needs the smallest start path before loading README.md
Load next: `README.md`, `getting-started/quickstart.md`, `skills/README.md`,
`contracts/agent-manifest.json`

Start with `README.md`. Then choose one skill:

- `skills/doca-programming-guide/SKILL.md` for Programming Guide, API, lifecycle, dependency, or DOCA Flow lookup.
- `skills/doca-discover-environment/SKILL.md` for read-only source, version, package, tool, device, or topology
  discovery.
- `skills/doca-task-router/SKILL.md` for contract routing and SDK sample build-planning evidence.

Default to read-only discovery. Inspect `<source-package-root>` for SDK facts. Do not install packages, mutate devices,
change networking, write credentials, change persistent configuration, run traffic, or execute runtime samples unless
the local owner explicitly approves that action class.
